title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HomeTown Global Group! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!
